name: Lupaka Gold Corp.
description: Lupaka Gold Corp. is a Canadian-based mining company focused on the acquisition and development of mineral properties. The company is currently reviewing potential projects with the objective of building a portfolio of assets that can be developed, sold, or joint-ventured. Lupaka holds properties in South East Oregon and is actively evaluating new prospects across various jurisdictions. Additionally, the company has been involved in international arbitration proceedings regarding its former Invicta Gold project in Peru, seeking to protect its investments under the Canada-Peru Free Trade Agreement.
